name: standup
description: | Convene the recently-active git worktrees as named agents in a markdown group chat, have them reconcile what each changed, and converge on ONE consolidated worktree. Each branch is an agent that posts to a shared STANDUP.md (YAML front matter holds the GOAL + PROMPT; the body is the chat log), then the room agrees on a merge order and a single consolidation plan in the SUMMATION. The room is filled either by time window (past 1h / 4h / 24h / 7d / all — only worktrees active in it join, so a 40
author: thedotmack
